caption:
Golden hour over New York City

To visit this specific spot:
Take the ferry from 39th Street/Midtown West to Port Imperial and walk about 15 minutes south.

📍Weehawken NJ Waterfront

transcription.text: Good morning, New Yorkers. Looking for another beautiful day here in the city? The clouds just started to soften here in Tipton State in the high 40s.
